commands: for path in src/bigclaw/console_ia.py src/bigclaw/issue_archive.py src/bigclaw/queue.py src/bigclaw/risk.py src/bigclaw/workspace_bootstrap.py tests/test_dashboard_run_contract.py tests/test_issue_archive.py tests/test_parallel_validation_bundle.py; do test ! -e "$path" && printf 'absent %s\n' "$path"; done

results.assigned_asset_absence:
absent src/bigclaw/console_ia.py
absent src/bigclaw/issue_archive.py
absent src/bigclaw/queue.py
absent src/bigclaw/risk.py
absent src/bigclaw/workspace_bootstrap.py
absent tests/test_dashboard_run_contract.py
absent tests/test_issue_archive.py
absent tests/test_parallel_validation_bundle.py

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1596 changes.

notes: This lane adds issue-scoped regression evidence for the stale Python assets named in BIG-GO-1596.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so the repo-visible change is the new guard and documentation rather than an in-branch Python deletion.
The Go-owned replacements listed here remain present in the checkout and cover the named Python surfaces.
